Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT IRONITE PRODUCTS COMPANY Special Motion To Strike Complaint For Statutory, Equitable And Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16:
APPEAR: James R. Wheaton, Esq. 510/208-4555 & Angela K. Chabot, Esq. 421-7151 for pltf & opposing party; Trenton H. Norris, Esq. & Shiraz D. Tangri, Esq. 213/680-6437 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: "Special motion to strike denied," and pltf's request for sanctions denied. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Conduct Limited Discovery;
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Text Ruling

APPEAR: James R. Wheaton, Esq. 510/208-4555 & Angela K. Chabot, Esq. 421-7151 for pltf & moving party; Trenton H. Norris, Esq. & Shiraz D. Tangri, Esq. 213/680-6437 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: Motion withdrawn. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
